Name: CharaInitParam
Description:
Defines instances of c0000 (player) characters in the game, including starting classes.
Note that many fields are not used and remain from earlier games, particularly with respect to starting classes.
Starting classes begin at 3000 with consecutive IDs, and starting gifts begin at 2400 likewise.

Fields.Name: Base FP Recovery Time
Fields.Description: Time until MP recovers 1 point (first decimal place)

Fields.Name: Base Stamina Recovery Time
Fields.Description: Time to recover 1 point of stamina (first decimal place)

Fields.Name: Characer Head Land - Damage Reduction
Fields.Description: Damage reduction amount (%) that can be a cushion when scolded by another character from above (first decimal place)

Fields.Name: Runes
Fields.Description: The amount of soul you have at the beginning

Fields.Name: Equipped Weapon: Right Primary
Fields.Description: Weapon ID of equipment parameter (right hand slot 1)

Fields.Name: Equipped Weapon: Right Secondary
Fields.Description: Weapon ID of equipment parameter (right hand slot 2)

Fields.Name: Equipped Weapon: Left Primary
Fields.Description: Weapon ID of equipment parameter (left hand slot 1)

Fields.Name: Equipped Weapon: Left Secondary
Fields.Description: Weapon ID of equipment parameter (left hand slot 2)

Fields.Name: Equipped Ammunition: Arrow Secondary
Fields.Description: Weapon ID of equipment parameter (arrow reserve)

Fields.Name: Equipped Ammunition: Bolt Secondary
Fields.Description: Weapon ID of equipment parameter (spare bolt)

Fields.Name: Revered Spirit Ash Blessing
Fields.Description: Level of Revered Spirit Ash Blessing

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Face Gen ID
Fields.Description: Facegen parameter ID used by NPC players. Not used by normal players.

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Think ID
Fields.Description: NPC Thinking Parameter ID used by NPC players. Not used by normal players.

Fields.Name: Base HP
Fields.Description: Basic value of HP (actually, it is corrected by the calculation formula)

Fields.Name: Base FP
Fields.Description: Basic value of MP (actually, it is corrected by the calculation formula)

Fields.Name: Base Stamina
Fields.Description: Basic value of stamina (actually, it is corrected by the formula)

Fields.Name: Equipped Gesture: Slot 0
Fields.Description: Gesture 0th (0 if you want to play EzState gesture 0)

Fields.Name: Equipped Gesture: Slot 1
Fields.Description: Gesture 1st (0 if you want to play EzState gesture 0)

Fields.Name: Equipped Gesture: Slot 2
Fields.Description: Gesture 2nd (0 if you want to play EzState's gesture 0)

Fields.Name: Equipped Gesture: Slot 3
Fields.Description: Gesture 3rd (0 if you want to play EzState gesture 0)

Fields.Name: Equipped Gesture: Slot 4
Fields.Description: Gesture 4th (0 if you want to play EzState's gesture 0)

Fields.Name: Equipped Gesture: Slot 5
Fields.Description: Gesture 5th (0 if you want to play EzState gesture 0)

Fields.Name: Equipped Gesture: Slot 6
Fields.Description: Gesture 6th (0 if you want to play EzState gesture 0)

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Type
Fields.Description: NPC type used by NPC players. Not used by normal players.

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Draw Type
Fields.Description: Drawing type used by NPC players. Not used by normal players.

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Sex
Fields.Description: The gender used by NPC players. It is not reflected to normal players.

Fields.Name: Is Sync Target
Fields.Description: Is it a send / receive target (for copy NPCs)?

Fields.Name: Weapon Param Type - Left Primary
Fields.Description: Parameter reference for left-handed weapon slot 1

Fields.Name: Weapon Param Type - Left Secondary
Fields.Description: Parameter reference for left-handed weapon slot 2

Fields.Name: Weapon Param Type - Left Tertiary
Fields.Description: Parameter reference for left-handed weapon slot 3

Fields.Name: Equipped Weapon: Right Tertiary
Fields.Description: Weapon ID of equipment parameter (right hand slot 3)

Fields.Name: Equipped Weapon: Left Tertiary
Fields.Description: Weapon ID of equipment parameter (left hand slot 3)

Fields.Name: Stored Item: Slot 1
Fields.Description: Item ID 01 of the second shortcut initial possession

Fields.Name: Stored Item: Slot 2
Fields.Description: Item ID 02 of the second shortcut initial possession

Fields.Name: Stored Item: Slot 3
Fields.Description: Item ID 03 of the second shortcut initial possession

Fields.Description: Item ID 04 of the second shortcut initial possession

Fields.Description: Item ID 05 of the second shortcut initial possession

Fields.Description: Item ID 06 of the second shortcut initial possession

Fields.Description: 2nd Shortcut Initial possession number of items 01

Fields.Description: 2nd Shortcut Initial possession number of items 02
